source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 2 orgs with matching tissue specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline searches PubMed/CTgov/web — may find ROSMAP/ADNI/ACT brain banks not in AminoChain. Those are valid finds. CHTN and NDRI are the highest-priority targets (US-based, well-documented). Braak staging documentation is the key differentiator.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data
Braak stage availability must cite a specific source — not assumed from autopsy context

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

CHTN Eastern.notes: CHTN is a well-established NCI network with documented protocols and named contacts. Braak staging is available through neuropathology program but not pre-indexed.

NDRI.notes: NDRI provides generic contact and tissue access but collection protocol depth is lower than CHTN. Braak staging status unknown without direct inquiry.

Stibion.notes: European biobank with reasonable contact and specimen counts but limited published protocol documentation.

BIOMEDICA CRO.notes: Commercial CRO with procurement network. Generic contact available. Protocol depth low — Braak staging unlikely without special arrangement.

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: not indexed in specimen registries — requires neuropathology report from source institution
not indexed — must be confirmed via neuropathology program at each org
implied by autopsy program context but not universally indexed — requires per-case confirmation
CSF not confirmed as available at all orgs — 28 urine specimens found, CSF requires direct inquiry
critical for RNA quality — not indexed in AminoChain
not available in specimen data — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR finds valid academic brain banks (ROSMAP, ACT, NACC) not present in AminoChain

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
Braak stage availability must NOT be assumed — requires explicit source
